title: Application Authentication Brute Force
description: Detects brute force login attempts against CRM Portal and Drone Shop by monitoring failed authentication events. Correlates with WAF signals and rate limiting events.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and ('Attack Type' in ('broken_auth', 'rate_limit_bypass', 'brute_force') or msg like '*login failed*' or msg like '*auth failure*') | stats count as Attempts, distinctcount(User) as UniqueUsers by 'Client IP', 'Service Name' | where Attempts > 5 | sort -Attempts
